goal: Establish a dedicated nightly live-evidence source for promotion-sensitive modules without changing PR gate semantics.
successCriteria: Nightly workflow emits stable live-verify gate and verification-report artifacts under nightly-specific paths.
Existing PR verify workflow behavior and artifact paths remain unchanged.
Phase 3 package creation can proceed on tracked policy without re-opening Phase 2.
explicitlyOutOfScope: No changes to PR gate schema or strictness.
